title: Kenyan French Cheese Pie
description: A unique fusion of French and Kenyan flavors, this indulgent pie is a perfect blend of savory and sweet.
instructions: Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch pie dish and trim the edges to fit.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Gruyère and Gouda cheese, matooke, and thyme.
Pour the cheese mixture into the pie crust.
Dot the top of the pie with butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie cool for 10 minutes before serving.
